# ICJIA Research Hub

> Research articles, downloadable datasets, and interactive data dashboards
> published by the Illinois Criminal Justice Information Authority's
> Research & Analysis Unit.

The Research Hub publishes criminal justice research for Illinois:
program evaluations, statistical reports, literature reviews, policy
briefs, datasets, and data dashboards.

## Sections

- Articles and reports: /researchhub/articles/
- Datasets: /researchhub/datasets/
- Interactive dashboards: /researchhub/apps/
- Research centers: /researchhub/centers/
- Major projects: /researchhub/projects/
- Search (includes document contents): /researchhub/search/

## Sitemap

- /researchhub/sitemap.xml
